---
title: "Project Status"
---

::: {.callout-note}
Generated by `scripts/generate-project-status.py` on 2026-06-15T09:52:14.173262.
:::

## Current milestone

mipvu-workflow-implemented-annotation-pending

## Case status

| Case | Status | Current stage | Manifest docs | Raw | Text | Segmented | MIPVU | Annotated | Concordance | Analysis |
|---|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|---|
| `am-rev` | corpus-ready | annotation-pending | 9 | 9 | 9 | 9 | 0 | 0 | stub | stub |
| `hitler` | corpus-ready | annotation-pending | 8 | 8 | 8 | 8 | 0 | 0 | stub | stub |
| `lincoln` | support-synthesis-draft | koenigsbergian-support-synthesis-draft | 3 | 3 | 3 | 3 | 3 | 0 | complete | complete |
| `napoleon` | corpus-ready | annotation-pending | 10 | 10 | 10 | 10 | 0 | 0 | stub | stub |
| `x-case` | draft | annotation-dependent-synthesis |  |  |  |  |  |  | draft | draft |

## Notes

Four case corpora are rights-reviewed, acquired, normalized, segmented, verified, and JSON-valid. Lincoln now has a reviewed MIPVU pilot sample, defined reliability workflow, provisional CMT mappings, and draft corpus-assisted/diachronic analysis outputs. Full-corpus MIPVU review, reliability adjudication, and promotion of public findings remain before v1.
